mapper.select: SELECT C.CART_ID AS cartId , C.CART_BARCODE AS cartBarcode , C.LINE_TYPE AS lineType , C.CREATE_DTTM AS createDttm , H.STATUS_TYPE AS latestStatusType , H.STATUS AS latestStatus , H.CREATE_DTTM AS latestStatusDttm FROM CART_MASTER C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CART_ID , STATUS_TYPE , STATUS , CREATE_DTTM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CART_ID ORDER BY CREATE_DTTM DESC, HIST_ID DESC) AS RN FROM EQUIPMENT_STATUS_HIST ) H ON C.CART_ID = H.CART_ID AND H.RN = 1 ORDER BY C.CART_ID

SELECT HIST_ID AS histId , EQP_ID AS eqpId , STATUS_TYPE AS statusType , CART_ID AS cartId , STATUS AS status , RESULT_JSON AS resultJson , CREATE_DTTM AS createDttm FROM EQUIPMENT_STATUS_HIST ORDER BY CREATE_DTTM DESC, HIST_ID DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT RESULT_ID AS resultId , CART_ID AS cartId , OVERALL_RESULT AS overallResult , INSPECT_DTTM AS inspectDttm FROM VISION_RESULT ORDER BY INSPECT_DTTM DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EQUIPMENT_STATUS_HIST (EQP_ID, STATUS_TYPE, CART_ID, STATUS, RESULT_JSON, CREATE_DTTM) VALUES ('MANUAL.ALARM.CLEAR', 'RFID_ALARM', #{cartId}, 'CLEARED', '관리자 알람 해제', NOW())
